hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 0; run(){ uv run pytest "$1" -q --no-header >&2 || exit 2; }; case "$f" in */locales/*.json) run tests/test_i18n.py ;; */pyproject.toml|*/email_export_import/__init__.py) run tests/test_version.py ;; */email_export_import/*.py) r=${f##*/email_export_import/}; a="tests/test_$(printf %s "$r" | tr / _)"; b="tests/test_$(basename "$f")"; if [ -f "$a" ]; then run "$a"; elif [ -f "$b" ]; then run "$b"; fi ;; esac
